mapper.insert: INSERT INTO csp_sys_deploy( groupid, deployid, hostname, username, deploycode, appcode, sysip, sysport, servaddr, isuseful, weight, remark) VALUES( #{groupid}, #{deployid}, #{hostname}, #{username}, #{deploycode}, #{appcode}, #{sysip}, #{sysport}, #{servaddr}, #{isuseful}, #{weight}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE csp_sys_deploy SET hostname=#{hostname}, username=#{username}, deploycode=#{deploycode}, appcode=#{appcode}, sysip=#{sysip}, sysport=#{sysport}, servaddr=#{servaddr}, isuseful=#{isuseful}, weight=#{weight}, remark=#{remark} WHERE groupid=#{groupid} AND deployid=#{deployid}
